ai_expertise.evidence: 7+ years at Samsung Research America focused on AI solutions; current role explicitly involves designing and deploying cutting-edge AI for wireless communication and sensing; authored research papers and drafted patents for AI implementations; PhD in CS with AI specialization from Texas A&M

wireless_expertise.evidence: Nearly 8 years at Samsung Research America (top-tier wireless R&D lab); current work explicitly on AI-enhanced wireless communication and wireless sensing; progressed from Senior Research Engineer to Staff Research Engineer II, indicating deep domain expertise

match_reasons: Perfect AI + Wireless Communication intersection - exactly matches target keywords

evaluation.recommended_action: Immediate outreach - this candidate is an exceptional match. Contact to discuss specific technical depth in MIMO, IRS, federated learning and gauge interest in Hong Kong/Shanghai opportunities. Consider executive-level engagement given seniority.
